use_codes.desc: INDICATED FOR THE LONG-TERM, ONCE-DAILY, MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF AIRFLOW OBSTRUCTION IN PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE (COPD), INCLUDING CHRONIC BRONCHITIS AND/OR EMPHYSEMA.
